title: Squishy Photonic Switches Promise Fast Low-Power Logic
summary: Photonic devices, which rely on light instead of electricity, have the potential to be faster and more energy efficient than today’s electronics. They also present a unique opportunity to develop devices using soft materials, such as polymers and gels, which are poor conductors of electricity but are easier to manufacture and more environmentally friendly.
